name: Guanghui Logistics Co.Ltd
summary: Guanghui Logistics Co.Ltd provides integrated business logistics services. It operates through Real Estate Sales, Logistics Park Operation, Business Factoring, and Others segments. The company is involved in the logistics park management; cold chain logistics; cargo transportation; real estate development and management; market management; advertising; warehousing and transportation; and consulting businesses, as well as engages in the construction of e-commerce platform. It also offers factoring services, including supply chain financing, accounts receivable management, credit investigation and evaluation, and credit risk guarantee services; and property services, as well as sells electromechanical products. Guanghui Logistics Co.Ltd is based in Urumqi, China.
